=== API Key Collection ===
Press Enter to skip optional keys.

  [required] Telegram Bot Token (from @BotFather)
        TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN:   [required] Groq API Key (primary AI engine)
        GROQ_API_KEY:   [required] Gemini API Key (Python bot primary AI)
        GEMINI_API_KEY:   [required] Admin Telegram User ID (your numeric Telegram ID)
        ADMIN_TELEGRAM_ID:   [optional] ElevenLabs API Key (TTS voice, optional)
        ELEVENLABS_API_KEY:   [optional] OpenAI API Key (embeddings, optional)
        OPENAI_API_KEY:   [optional] Qdrant URL (vector DB, optional)
        QDRANT_URL:   [optional] Qdrant API Key (optional)
        QDRANT_API_KEY:   [optional] Zilliz URL (cold vector memory, optional)
        ZILLIZ_URL:   [optional] Zilliz API Key (optional)
        ZILLIZ_API_KEY:   [optional] Express Session Secret (random string, optional)
        SESSION_SECRET:   [optional] PostgreSQL Database URL (optional)
        DATABASE_URL:   [optional] Replit API Token (needed by decrypt_setup.py to auto-set secrets)
        REPLIT_API_TOKEN:   [optional] Spare slot — any extra key you want to bundle
        SPARE_KEY_15:

Keep it safe — you'll need it to decrypt.
